---
title: "The Saint\'s Tragedy, or, The true story of Elizabeth of Hungary, Landgravine of Thuringia, Saint of the Romish calendar"
---

## The Saint\'s Tragedy, or, The true story of Elizabeth of Hungary, Landgravine of Thuringia, Saint of the Romish calendar

**Author:** The Rev. Charles Kingsley
**Date:** 1848
**Imprint:** London: Parker

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
